app.name: SpellPaw
app.tagline: AI-assisted short drama & video production tool

auth.switchToLogin: Already have an account? Sign in

security.title: Security
security.description: Change your password regularly to keep your account safe
security.passwordMin: Password must be at least 8 characters

integrations.title: Integrations / API
integrations.description: Manage third-party API keys and local integration settings
integrations.languageModelDescription: Used for Copilot chat and Agent tool calls
integrations.multimodalDescription: Used for images, image-to-image, style transfer and video
integrations.doubaoHint: Used for Doubao image generation, image-to-image, style transfer and video
integrations.llmBaseUrlHint: Pre-filled for the selected provider; usually no need to change

hero.subtitle2: breaks down shots, paces the rhythm.

heroSearch.modelPickerAlert: Model picker: Seedance / Kling / Omni coming soon

features.title: Core capabilities
features.subtitle: An end-to-end AI toolkit built for short drama and short-form creators

dialog.title: Chat that acts
dialog.description: The AI agent doesn't just chat—it edits project structure, generates scenes, and tightens narrative rhythm.

structure.title: Structure is content
structure.description: An act → scene → shot tree becomes the spine of your story, keeping complex projects organized.

canvas.title: Canvas as workspace
canvas.description: An infinite canvas of cards visualizes your thinking—drag, arrange, what you see is what you get.

rhythm.title: AI rhythm analysis
rhythm.description: Real-time pacing distribution analysis flags rhythm imbalances so you control the tension.

sync.title: Smart sync
sync.description: Tree and canvas stay in sync, with local IndexedDB cache and cloud push/pull.

templates.title: Narrative templates
templates.description: Built-in templates for thriller, romance, comedy—one click to kickstart your story.

workflow.title: From idea to final cut in 4 steps
workflow.subtitle: AI handles the structural heavy lifting so you can focus on the creative parts

idea.title: One-line idea
idea.desc: Type a synopsis or upload a script—AI extracts the three-act structure.

characters.title: Characters & world
characters.desc: Generate character cards and mood boards in one click to build your world.

storyboard.title: Storyboard breakdown
storyboard.desc: AI splits shots automatically; rhythm analysis keeps the pacing tight.

production.title: Visual production
production.desc: Export a storyboard PDF or call AI to generate reference images and video.

models.label: AI models
models.desc: Doubao, DeepSeek, SiliconFlow, OpenAI and more

templates.label: Narrative templates
templates.desc: Thriller / romance / comedy / urban ready to go

skills.label: Built-in skills
skills.desc: Character card / storyboard / rhythm at one click

sync.label: Cloud sync
sync.desc: Pick up anywhere, autosave as you go

cta.noInstall: No install, just open and create
cta.subtitle: Try SpellPaw now—turn your story spark into a shoot-ready, full storyboard.
